title: Compliance: Rust link_layer.rs replay protection
description: Policy: 02-physical-link.md §4.4. File: rust/lichen-link/src/link_layer.rs. Status: VIOLATION. Lines 191-210 ReplayProtector keyed by (pubkey,epoch) creates independent windows per epoch. An old epoch with fresh seqnum would be accepted. Spec requires rejecting epoch < LastEpoch. Fix: track per-peer highest epoch and reject epoch < LastEpoch.
close_reason: Fixed: ReplayProtector now tracks per-peer highest epoch and rejects epoch < LastEpoch using half-space arithmetic for wrap-around. Added tests old_epoch_rejected and epoch_wraparound_handled.
